intended_reader: Maintainers who want to see the local failure and repair path before adding a CI gate.
limits: This page replays recorded deterministic evidence; it does not execute in the browser.
The fixture proves one region-binding workflow, not every supported extractor.
prerequisites: No account, credentials, backend, or database.
The outputs below come from a generated temporary repository.

steps.output:
[drift] public-command: README.md
--- README.md
+++ README.md (derived)
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 ## Command
 
 <!-- clean-docs:begin public-command -->
-clean-docs check
+clean-docs check --changed
 <!-- clean-docs:end public-command -->

[repaired] public-command: README.md
--- README.md
+++ README.md (derived)
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 ## Command
 
 <!-- clean-docs:begin public-command -->
-clean-docs check
+clean-docs check --changed
 <!-- clean-docs:end public-command -->
drive: repaired 1 document(s); implemented policy checks passed

title: Documentation drift, caught before it ships
value: The same deterministic binding reports a current page, catches a source change, repairs only its declared region, and passes the final check.
